examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (9319 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 137 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
API usage-doc coverage is low: 0.0% (1676 API pages detected)
Example reliability: 0% on 2584 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.

analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 2,584 pages from Clerk.com documentation with 100% crawl coverage. Detected 37 confirmed broken internal documentation links and 137 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits. API reference coverage is critically low at 0.0% despite 1,676 API pages detected. Example reliability scored 0%, flagged as likely detection limitation due to JS-rendered code blocks. Overall confidence stands at 53%, with link verification confidence at only 25%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage achieved: 100% of 2,598 in-scope pages successfully crawled
High freshness metadata coverage: 98.88% of pages include last-updated timestamps
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
Low SEO/geo issue rate of 4.34% indicates good technical SEO hygiene
No repository navigation broken links (0 repo_broken_links_count)
risks: 37 confirmed broken internal documentation links actively degrading user navigation experience
0.0% API reference coverage indicates severe gap between API endpoints and usage documentation for 1,676 API pages
137 unverified links create uncertainty in link health; may hide additional broken links behind auth walls
Example reliability at 0% suggests JS-rendered code blocks are invisible to audit tooling, masking code quality issues
Overall confidence of 53% and link confidence of 25% indicate audit results may underrepresent true documentation health
204 trap URLs skipped during crawl may indicate pagination or infinite scroll issues affecting discoverability
560 requested pages not crawled (3,144 requested vs 2,584 crawled) suggests scope limitations or access barriers

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 37 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Audit and document usage examples for 1,676 API pages to achieve minimum 60% reference coverage
Investigate 137 unverified links; implement monitoring for auth-protected and rate-limited endpoints
Enable server-side rendering or static generation for code examples to improve auditability and SEO
Review 204 trap URLs and 560 uncrawled pages to identify and fix crawl barriers or scope gaps

limitations: External audit cannot verify links behind authentication, rate-limits, or server blocks (137 unverified URLs excluded from broken-link counts)
JavaScript-rendered code examples appear invisible to crawler; 0% example reliability likely reflects detection failure, not actual code absence
Audit cannot validate functional correctness of API documentation, code example accuracy, or whether examples execute successfully
25% link confidence and 53% overall confidence indicate significant blind spots; actual documentation health may be worse than reported
Cannot assess content quality, technical accuracy, completeness of explanations, or alignment between code samples and current API versions
